axes.zapatilla-habla-sola: Surreal product-led — sin persona, zapatilla como protagonista
axes.revancha-del-barrio: Emocional — el pibe excluido que ahora tiene el par de un campeón
axes.clase-del-96: VHS/retro 90s — el heritage de SHAQ como estética Gen Z
axes.cuotas-de-rey: Conversión argentina — Mercado Pago + humor local = compra

prompts.prompt: SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. High-contrast street photography aesthetic — harsh Buenos Aires light, cement surfaces, authentic barrio environments. White/gold HOF or 4X sneakers as absolute visual heroes. Feel: a 90s NBA legend arriving in the Argentine barrio. Dominant, accessible, authentic. Not luxury — legacy. Warm color grade, high contrast. Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a static ad designed like a 1996 NBA trading card / Panini sticker. Background: worn cardboard texture in burnt orange (#C4561A) with gold border frame. Top third: bold condensed uppercase typography in gold reading 'CLASE DEL 96. LLEGA AL BARRIO.' Below in smaller cream text: 'Las zapatillas de la leyenda. shaq.com.ar'. Bottom half: SHAQ HOF white/gold high-top sneaker standing upright on the card surface, studio lit, crisp. Bottom left corner: stylized '32' in SHAQ's jersey number style. SHAQ logo bottom right in gold. The whole image feels like the most coveted card in the álbum. 4:5 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Eje: Figurita de leyenda. 90s trading card aesthetic. Hero template.

prompts.prompt: SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. High-contrast street photography aesthetic — harsh Buenos Aires light, cement surfaces, authentic barrio environments. White/gold HOF or 4X sneakers as absolute visual heroes. Feel: a 90s NBA legend arriving in the Argentine barrio. Dominant, accessible, authentic. Not luxury — legacy. Warm color grade, high contrast. Use the attached images as brand reference. Create: a static ad with a deep navy (#0A1E5E) background. Center: SHAQ HOF white/gold sneaker, large, front-facing, dramatic spotlight from above. Four stat callout boxes radiating outward with gold connector lines: 'ALTURA: 2.16M', 'CAMPEONATOS: 4', 'PUNTOS: 28,596', 'ZAPATILLAS: TUS PIES'. Each stat in bold gold condensed sans-serif on dark background chips. Bottom: 'LA LEYENDA. AHORA EN TUS PIES. shaq.com.ar' in gold uppercase. The product glows. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Stats are Shaq's real career numbers. Last stat is the hook.

prompts.prompt:
SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. High-contrast street photography aesthetic — harsh Buenos Aires light, cement surfaces, authentic barrio environments. White/gold HOF or 4X sneakers as absolute visual heroes. Feel: a 90s NBA legend arriving in the Argentine barrio. Dominant, accessible, authentic. Not luxury — legacy. Warm color grade, high contrast. Create: a bold statement ad with a gradient background transitioning from deep navy (#0A1E5E) top to burnt gold (#C48A00) bottom. Center: massive condensed uppercase white text '2 METROS.
4 ANILLOS.
1 ZAPATILLA.' in dramatic stacked layout. Below: 'SHAQ SHOES. ARGENTINA.' in smaller gold tracking. Bottom: SHAQ HOF sneaker small but impactful, white/gold catching light. The typography IS the image — powerful, commanding, impossible to scroll past. 1:1 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Typography-dominant. Figurita axis — the stats as poetry.

prompts.prompt: SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. prompts.prompt: SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. High-contrast street photography aesthetic — harsh Buenos Aires light, cement surfaces, authentic barrio environments. White/gold HOF or 4X sneakers as absolute visual heroes. Feel: a 90s NBA legend arriving in the Argentine barrio. Dominant, accessible, authentic. Not luxury — legacy. Warm color grade, high contrast. Create: a surreal lifestyle scene. Setting: a Buenos Aires potrero (outdoor cement basketball court) at golden hour — warm orange sky, cracked asphalt, distant villa silhouette. Foreground: SHAQ 4X white/gold sneakers placed neatly at center court as if left by someone who ascended. No person — just the sneakers and the empty court. The absence of a person IS the story. Overlay text bottom: 'EL JUEGO SIGUE. ¿VAS A ENTRAR?' in bold gold uppercase. SHAQ logo top right. 9:16 aspect ratio.
prompts.notes: Existential/poetic. The absent player. Strong visual metaphor.

prompts.prompt: SHAQ Argentina visual system: bold navy blue (#0A1E5E) and championship gold (#F5A623) as primary palette. Bold condensed uppercase sans-serif typography. Below: five grayscale publication logos (Sports Illustrated, SLAM Magazine, El Gráfico, ESPN, NBA.com) slightly faded like old newsprint. Dropcap first paragraph in 90s sports magazine style: 'Corría 1996 cuando Shaquille O'Neal dominó como nadie lo había hecho.
